Presenting Your Customer Captivation Offer:

-- 3 of 8 --

4 Elements Of A Customer Captivation Page:!
1. 	Ugly Video Sales Letter (VSL)!
2. 	Delayed CTA Button!
3. 	*Exit Redirect!
4. 	*Long-Form Sales Letter Version
Module 4 - Lesson 3
Presenting Your Customer Captivation Offer:

-- 4 of 8 --

Module 4 - Lesson 3
Presenting Your Customer Captivation Offer:

-- 5 of 8 --

Module 4 - Lesson 3
Presenting Your Customer Captivation Offer:
•NO 	Branding!
•NO 	Header Graphic!
•NO 	Headline!
•NO 	Add To Cart Button

-- 6 of 8 --

Keys To Your Ugly Video Sales Letter (VSL):!
•ALWAYS Start With A Word-For-Word Written Script!
•Record The Audio Separately First (Audacity)!
•Focus On Voice Inflection, Tone, Pace, Volume!
•The Slides Should Be Pure Text And Match Your Script!
•More Slides With Less Text Are Best (Movement)!
•Every 6th-8th Slide Do 	NOT 	Match Word-For-Word!
•Use A Video Streaming Service For Mobile Compatibility
(i.e. Vimeo Pro, Wistia)
Module 4 - Lesson 3
Presenting Your Customer Captivation Offer:

-- 7 of 8 --

*Customer Captivation Page Extras:!
•Exit Redirect!
•Long-Form Sales Letter Version
